text.heading: OBAFEMI AWOLOWO UNIVERSITY
CENTRE FOR DISTANCE LEARNING
INTERNAL MEMORANDUM
SUBMISSION OF FIRST CONTACT PERIOD EXAMINATION RESULTS
text.p: I write to thank you for your immense contributions towards the successful completion of the First Contact Period Examination and to request that the examination scripts be speedily graded so that the subject coordinator can turn in the results by Tuesday, 20 March, 2007.
Once again, I thank you for your cooperation.
